privileged_info_summary: This is a Blender 3D task requiring creation of a physical sky reference scene with two material spheres. Verified file paths: blend file saves to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/sky_reference_setup.blend and render saves to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/sky_reference_render.png. Verified sphere locations: Chrome sphere at (-2, 0, 1) and Matte sphere at (2, 0, 1). Critical discrepancy: Task description specifies sun elevation range of 'approx 15-25 degrees' for golden hour effect, but metadata specifies verification range of 10-35 degrees. The 10-35 degree range does not align with the task description's stated 15-25 degree target. Verified render size minimum of 50 KB is reasonable sanity check. Location tolerance of 1.5 units is not explicitly specified anywhere in task documentation.
